title: Heku 30336-23: Silver Decorative Stones, 750 g, in Resealable Tin
features: Coloured decorative stones approximately 9–13 mm in size
750 g in a practical cylinder tin with screw cap
Ideal for beautifying glass vessels, tea lights, etc., for various other decorations and also suitable for crafts
description: From the manufacturer About us: The HEKU is a marketing and distribution company with emphasis in the fields of paper goods and consumer goods as well as everyday items. The Heku looks back on a company history over 30 years. The company is founded by Helmut Kusch in Mainz. The HEKU combines 20 product groups and product ranges under one roof. Over 2,000 items from production facilities are brought together under the brand "HEKU" and delivered to the trade. Our customers include classic food retailers, trade chains, construction, beverage and post markets as well as "non-species" companies that expand their existing range with HEKU products. The HEKU company philosophy is the conceptual expansion of the individual product groups. With numerous ranges and many product groups, our product range ranges from gift wrapping items and table and party decoration to various practical household items that make everyday life easier.
